description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for the OpenTelemetry Collector. Tracks receivers, processors, exporters, runtime metrics, and HTTP server performance using OTel Collector internal telemetry metrics.
title: OTel Collector

fbd5e436-e9aa-4b80-bce2-32cfafefa98a.description: The service instance ID of the OTel Collector
fbd5e436-e9aa-4b80-bce2-32cfafefa98a.name: collector_name
fbd5e436-e9aa-4b80-bce2-32cfafefa98a.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'service.instance.id') AS `service.instance.id` FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day WHERE metric_name = 'otelcol_process_uptime' AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'service.instance.id') != '' GROUP BY `service.instance.id`
